name: Garden Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil water for linguine.
2. Dice onion and sauté in the wines and vinegar.
3. Chop garlic and add after 3 minutes.
4. Add all herbs, vegetables (except tomatoes), and cook down, adding water if necessary. Cook pasta in the meantime.
5. When cooked to taste, add tomatoes.
6. Serve over pasta.
Cooking the eggplant in the wine and vinegar gives it a subtle sweetness and a consistency similar to mushrooms.
